title: lepidium ruderale
intro: Lepidium ruderale, also known as watercress peppergrass, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) that is native to South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of compounds like glucosinolates and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Lepidium ruderale include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as potential anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in culinary applications to add flavor and nutrition to dishes.
